description: AI-powered life insurance needs analysis, product matching, and underwriting assessment for personalized coverage recommendations

agents.name: Needs Analyst
agents.description: Evaluates applicant life stage, income, dependents, and financial obligations to determine optimal coverage levels and identify protection gaps

agents.name: Product Matcher
agents.description: Matches applicant profiles against available insurance products, compares coverage options, and recommends optimal product combinations with premium estimates

agents.name: Underwriting Assistant
agents.description: Assesses risk factors including health history, lifestyle choices, and family medical background to determine risk category and recommend underwriting actions
